body_txt: Don't you just get sick of those nasty villains constantly surviving against all odds? Do you wish that the fabled Joker Immunity would just run out at some point? Well... sometimes, that does happen, and sometimes a villain's ability to cheat death fails them totally. They die once and for all and they never come back again. For the Joker Immunity Warranty to kick in, a recurring villain who has a habit of cheating death must die and not come back in any way. Perhaps the characters Make Sure He's Dead and it sticks. Maybe it's the final installment in the series and we know they won’t be back after. Or maybe they find The Problem with Fighting Death is that even he grows tired of cheating it. Sub-Trope of Killed Off for Real . Can overlap with Cheated Death, Died Anyway . Compare with Karma Houdini Warranty , if the villain has escaped justice because of their inability to die too. As one of the Death Tropes , all spoilers will be unmarked.
